name: Chimney
items_start: Wood boards nailed to chimney wall
hints: You are inside the chimney. There is soot and boards nailed to the wall. Listen carefully.
LISTEN - the moaning is louder up here. Someone may be stuck further up. The boards may be climbable.
GO UP or CLIMB to reach the narrow part of the chimney where a chimney sweep is stuck.
GET SOOT (useful for cleaning). Climb higher to find the stuck chimney sweep (room 18). DOWN returns to the fireplace.

effects: Message: I hear strange sounds, as if someone were moaning.
Message: Its much louder up here.

notes: Inside the chimney with soot and wooden boards. LISTEN reveals louder moaning (sweep stuck above). GO UP reaches the narrow chimney (room 18). DOWN returns to the fireplace (room 15).
